items.reason: Replaces log_rate_limit with LogSampler behavior, three sample rates, derivation rules, and supported configuration paths.
Removes the obsolete standalone DATASYSTEM_LOG_RATE_LIMIT client environment variable after worker-owned sampling config replaces it.
Replaces the dscli log_rate_limit entry with request_sample_rate, access_sample_rate, diagnostic_sample_rate, and derivation semantics.
Adds routing entries for the new unified class-based log sampler design.
Adds LogSampler to the logging module overview, source list, routing guidance, and component map.
New design doc covers the random sampler architecture, flags, propagation, hot-path constraints, and validation expectations.
The Helm values changed from logRateLimit to requestSampleRate/accessSampleRate/diagnosticSampleRate, but the Kubernetes configuration table was not updated.
The existing logging design still describes log_rate_limit quota behavior and client sync instead of the new LogSampler sample-rate model.
Trace context docs still refer to local log_rate_limit decisions and need the new request_sample_rate/LogSampleState semantics.
AccessRecorder now participates in access_sample_rate pre-drop and forced retention, but the existing access-recorder doc was not updated.
